_meta.notes: SYNTHETIC, hand-generated (no live LIST PROCESSORS capture available) — replace with a real capture: drop a vessel with multiple kOS CPUs into KSP, run the kos-processors script, and paste the [KOSDATA:kos-processors]processors=… array here. Three CPUs chosen to exercise the full row chrome: a tagged 'system' CPU (the user's named control CPU) in READY mode with a boot file, a tagged boot CPU in READY mode, and an untagged idle CPU in OFF mode (renders the italic 'untagged' label + muted ModeDot). Keys live under the kos.* prefix so the probe routes them to the 'kos' source.
